meaning: n.切肉刀,切割者,突出的悬崖
examples: "I don't like you," he told Cleaver, "but I'll stand up for you."
“I don’t like you,” he told Cleaver, “but I’ll stand up for you.”
"I drink nettle and cleaver tea, sometimes with some fresh lemon verbena when I find it," he says.
Caught between conflicting loyalties, Cleaver says he is not happy at all about being a superdelegate.
Cleaver was also told he would be put on the sex offenders' register for five years.
